roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS  /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVECREDIT FOR  14  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUALTREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON TUESDAY, JUNE3, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYSOF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENTWITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER, VIOLATION # 1 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 4-21-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIMELOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
